C:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc libethos_core.a CMakeFiles/ethos_core.dir/Src/emu/Console/Console.c.obj CMakeFiles/ethos_core.dir/Src/emu/Core/Emulator.c.obj CMakeFiles/ethos_core.dir/Src/emu/Core/Logger.c.obj CMakeFiles/ethos_core.dir/Src/emu/FIles/FIles.c.obj CMakeFiles/ethos_core.dir/Src/emu/Mem/Mem.c.obj
C:\MinGW\bin\ranlib.exe libethos_core.a
